summary: Completed comprehensive testing of F1 Intelligence web app's newly added features: Constructor profiles, Season profiles, and Rivalry Explorer circuit-by-circuit breakdown. All backend APIs and frontend integrations are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API Health Check - 23/23 tests passed
Constructor Profile API (/api/constructor/131/profile) - Returns stats, timeline, top drivers
Season Profile API (/api/season/2023/profile) - Returns driver/constructor standings, race winners
Rivalry Circuit Breakdown API (/api/rivalry/1/830) - Returns circuit_breakdown array with per-circuit H2H stats
Constructor Profile Frontend - Mercedes profile loads with stats, performance timeline, top drivers section
Season Profile Frontend - 2023 season loads with championship standings and race winners
Rivalry Explorer Circuit Breakdown Tab - Shows 32 circuits with qualifying/race/victory comparisons
Story Explorer Navigation - Teams/Seasons tabs functional
Rivalry Explorer Tab Switching - Overview and Circuit Breakdown tabs working
